title: Rose Heirloom Porcelain Doll
shortDescription: Hand-detailed porcelain doll with a rose-toned costume and cabinet-ready silhouette.
description: A graceful showcase piece with painted lashes, softly blushed cheeks, and gathered skirt layers that photograph beautifully in both shelves and collector cabinets.

title: Violet Parlor Bonnet
shortDescription: Collector bonnet with velvet ribbon accents and fine lace framing details.
description: An accessory piece built for styling antique dolls or enriching flat-lay product photography, with soft violet ribboning and a structured vintage brim.

title: Velvet Parlor Bear
shortDescription: Soft mohair companion with velvet bow and restored collector presentation.
description: This warm-toned companion adds charm beside doll displays, with a gentle expression, restored fur texture, and a bow finish that feels true to parlor styling.

title: Heirloom Display Stand
shortDescription: Walnut-toned stand with brass-inspired details for cabinet or tabletop presentation.
description: A simple but elevated display base that lifts collectible pieces visually, making product photography and marketplace presentation cleaner and more consistent.

title: Satin Keepsake Dress
shortDescription: Collector wardrobe piece with satin drape, structured bodice, and pearl-toned trim.
description: Designed to refresh a display wardrobe with elegant volume, the dress balances soft sheen with vintage-inspired tailoring for a polished presentation.

title: Miniature Trousseau Set
shortDescription: Cotton set with folded linens, ribbon closures, and display-friendly storage details.
description: A charming grouped collectible that adds narrative to a display scene, with neatly folded pieces, stitched edging, and soft neutral tones.
